title: MIMS
description: mims.com zoominfo.com/c/mims-pte-ltd/354424916 MIMS is a pharmaceutical prescribing reference guide first published in the United Kingdom in 1959 by Haymarket Media Group. The platform provides comprehensive drug information — including dosages, interactions, clinical guidelines, and prescribing data — for healthcare professionals across the globe. MIMS operates internationally across Asia, Australia, and beyond, with dedicated editions for countries including Malaysia, India, Indonesia, Japan, Singapore, and many others. Its mobile app and online database are used daily by doctors and pharmacists for drug lookups, medical news, and CME articles
